name: SQM (Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile)
content: SQM is a global leader in the production of lithium, iodine, and specialty plant nutrients. Operating primarily in the Salar de Atacama in Chile, SQM has access to some of the world's highest-grade and lowest-cost lithium brine deposits. The company is a Tier 1 supplier to the global battery-electric ecosystem, providing high-purity lithium carbonate and lithium hydroxide essential for high-performance electric vehicle batteries.
